props.text: Select a file for the new operation:

config.script:
rowIndex = event.rowIndex
	imageData = self.props.data
	fileName = event.value
	fileType = imageData[rowIndex]['fileType']
	fileData = imageData[rowIndex]['fileData']
	headFileUUID = imageData[rowIndex]['headFileUUID']
	headConfigUUID = imageData[rowIndex]['headConfigUUID']
	user = self.session.props.auth.user.userName
	
	data = {
		'fileName': fileName,
		'fileType': fileType,
		'fileData': fileData,
		'headFileUUID': headFileUUID,
		'headConfigUUID': headConfigUUID,
		'user': user
	}
	
	BlueRidge.Config.HeadConfig.updateHeadFile(data)
	system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")

user = str(self.session.props.auth.user.userName)
	data = {
		'user': user,
		'headFileUUID': self.view.custom.selectedFile,
		'headConfigUUID': self.view.params.head,
		'operationTypeUUID': self.view.params.operation
	}
	BlueRidge.Config.HeadConfig.addHeadOperation(data)
	system.perspective.sendMessage("refreshTrigger")
	system.perspective.closePopup("AddHeadOperation",None, self.page.props.pageId)
